title: aconitum humile
intro: Aconitum humile, also known as dwarf monk's hood, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Aconitum genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, containing alkaloids such as aconitine, which have analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aconitum humile include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Aconitum humile is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, but caution is advised due to the plant's toxicity and potential side effects.
